recommendations.title: American Ninja 5
recommendations.overview: When a scientists daughter is kidnapped, American Ninja, attempts to find her, but this time he teams up with a youngster he has trained in the ways of the ninja.

recommendations.title: An Almost Ordinary Summer
recommendations.overview: Two families meet for a marriage that neither want, and things take a turn when the respective patriarchs fall in love.

recommendations.title: Dilwale

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
recommendations.overview: A husband and wife struggle to keep their marriage alive until they realize they are both secretly working as assassins. Now, their respective assignments require them to kill each other.

recommendations.title: West Side Story
recommendations.overview: Two youngsters from rival New York City gangs fall in love, but tensions between their respective friends build toward tragedy.

recommendations.title: Tamara
recommendations.overview: Tamara, an unattractive girl who is picked on by her peers, returns after her death as a sexy seductress to enact revenge.

recommendations.title: Gagarin: First in Space

recommendations.title: The Big Brawl
recommendations.overview: A young Asian American martial artist is forced to participate in a brutal formal street-fight competition.
